text.title: Paid Acquisition Growth Strategy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: compute-cac-ceiling
step.action: Compute CAC ceiling = LTV × margin × payback_share. Lock as gate.

step.name: set-stop-loss
step.action: Stop-loss CAC + auto-pause after 14 days breach.

step.name: review-monthly
step.action: Refresh LTV monthly; re-compute ceiling; rebalance.
